text:
おーおーおーおー、見事見事。
これまでにないタイムに
お兄さん驚きだよ。

やっぱり、きみの実力は本物だねー。
アークスにとってうれしいことだよ。
うんうん。

これからも、その力で
アークスのため、世界のために
がんばってほしいなあ。

Well, well, well! Lookie you! This fella's never
seen anyone move quick as a flash like you
just now, pardner.

Seems like you're the real deal after all.
Just the sort ARKS should be happy to have
around, lemme tell ya.

I sure hope you put that skill of yours to use
to help out ARKS, save the world, all that,
y'know?
Better make sure I keep at it, too.
